summary: Add @codemirror/autocomplete and @codemirror/lint as dependencies to gui/package.json (needed for completion source and diagnostic rendering); Add reify-lsp and tokio dependencies to gui/src-tauri/Cargo.toml so the Tauri backend can instantiate the LSP server in-process; Write test in crates/reify-lsp/tests/in_process_bridge.rs: InProcessLsp can be created and responds to initialize request, returning ServerCapabilities with completion/hover/definition providers; Create crates/reify-lsp/src/bridge.rs with InProcessLsp struct that wraps LspService, exposes handle_request(method, params_json) -> Result<serde_json::Value>, and dispatches initialize/shutdown. Export from lib.rs; Write test: InProcessLsp handles textDocument/didOpen and textDocument/completion returns non-empty results for .ri content with bracket source; Implement didOpen, didChange, didClose, and completion dispatch in InProcessLsp.handle_request by deserializing params and calling the LanguageServer trait methods; Write test: InProcessLsp handles textDocument/hover and returns hover info for a known symbol in bracket source; Implement hover dispatch in InProcessLsp.handle_request; Write test: InProcessLsp handles textDocument/definition and returns a location for a known identifier; Implement goto-definition dispatch in InProcessLsp.handle_request; Write test: InProcessLsp captures diagnostics after didOpen with syntax error source — diagnostics are retrievable via a get_diagnostics method or polling state; Implement diagnostics capture in InProcessLsp — after didOpen/didChange, poll server state's last_published_diagnostics and expose via get_diagnostics(uri) method

Write test in gui/src-tauri/src/tests/lsp_bridge_tests.rs: LspBridge can be constructed and initialized, lsp_request_impl dispatches 'initialize' and returns valid JSON; Create gui/src-tauri/src/lsp_bridge.rs with LspBridge struct wrapping InProcessLsp, add LspBridge to AppState, add lsp_request_impl helper function. Register module in lib.rs; Write test: lsp_request_impl handles textDocument/completion and returns parsed completion items after opening a document; Wire lsp_request_impl to forward all LSP methods through InProcessLsp.handle_request, handle the request/notification distinction (notifications like didOpen don't return values); Write test: diagnostics emission — after didOpen with syntax error, LspBridge produces diagnostics that can be serialized for Tauri event emission; Implement diagnostics polling/forwarding in LspBridge — after each request that might produce diagnostics, check server state and return diagnostics alongside the response (or emit via callback); Wire lsp_request Tauri command in main.rs to use LspBridge from AppState instead of the error stub. Add LspBridge initialization in main() setup. Add Tauri event emission for diagnostics; Write gui/src/__tests__/lspClient.test.ts: lspClient module exports createLspClient that sends requests through lspRequest bridge and returns typed responses. Test initialize request mock; Create gui/src/editor/lspClient.ts: LSP client wrapper that calls bridge.lspRequest(), manages document sync (didOpen/didChange notifications), provides typed methods for completion/hover/definition; Write gui/src/__tests__/completions.test.ts: completion source function returns CodeMirror CompletionResult by calling lspRequest with textDocument/completion; Create gui/src/editor/completions.ts: CodeMirror CompletionSource that calls lspClient.completion() and maps LSP CompletionItems to CodeMirror Completion objects; Write gui/src/__tests__/diagnostics.test.ts: diagnostics module subscribes to 'diagnostics' Tauri event and converts LSP diagnostics to CodeMirror lint Diagnostic format; Create gui/src/editor/diagnostics.ts: subscribes to onDiagnostics Tauri event, converts LSP diagnostics (line/col ranges, severity) to CodeMirror lintGutter/setDiagnostics format, provides a CM extension; Create gui/src/editor/hover.ts: CodeMirror tooltip extension that calls lspClient.hover() on mouse hover and displays the result. Create gui/src/editor/gotoDefinition.ts: Ctrl+click handler that calls lspClient.gotoDefinition() and navigates

Wire all LSP extensions into Editor.tsx: add completions, diagnostics, hover, and gotoDefinition extensions to the CodeMirror editor setup. Initialize LSP client on mount, sync documents via didOpen/didChange, listen for diagnostic events, and clean up on unmount. All 175 TS tests and 8 Rust LSP tests pass. Task complete.

Wire all LSP extensions into Editor.tsx: add completions, diagnostics, hover, and gotoDefinition extensions to the CodeMirror editor setup. Ensure lspClient is initialized on mount and documents are synced
Debug fix for: Failures: lint issues

Complete remaining 5 fix steps: Add initialized() and didClose() to LspClient (step-26/27), refactor LSP extensions to accept dynamic URI getter () => string (step-28/29), fix Editor.tsx with proper LSP initialization chain, file switch didClose/didOpen, dynamic URI getters, and cleanup didClose (step-30). All 182 TS tests and all Rust LSP tests pass.
